alkylation reagent: alkylated with 17 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) for 30 min in the dark
cleavage agent: Trypsin was then added at a 1:20 protease-to-protein ratio
fragmentation method: the fragmentation method used for identification of TMT labeled peptides was based on higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: analyzed via LC-MS/MS with an LTQ-Orbitrap Velos
labeling: Differential peptide labeling was performed using Tandem Mass TagTM 6-plex (TMTsixplexTM) Reagents
